name: 13"x20" Sunbrella Outdoor Throw Pillow Ruby: Hexagonal Dot Design, UV & Weather-Resistant Acrylic, Polyester Fill
description: The Ruby Outdoor Throw Pillow from Sunbrella makes a lovely, fresh addition to your summer decor. In an appealing shade of red and featuring an attractive dot design in a hexagonal pattern, this outdoor throw pillow elevates your outdoor ensemble while adding a little extra comfort to your surroundings. The weather-resistant fabric keeps it looking great season after season, and it's amply stuffed for a comfortable, supportive surface. Add it to a bank of pillows on your outdoor couch for a bold pop of color and pattern, or simply place it on a wicker side chair or lounger for a little extra comfort. Sunbrella is a 100% acrylic fabric that is water resistant, spill resistant, and fade resistant. Ideal for outdoor use, Sunbrella fabric is UV treated for high-quality fade resistance.
